title: King Charles III England Coast Path on the Isle of Wight: comment on changes to the proposed route at Luccombe
body: "On 9 August 2023, Natural England submitted a report to the Secretary of State for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs setting out changes to the proposed route of the King Charles III England Coast Path at Luccombe, Shanklin, part of the Isle of Wight stretch.  Read the modification report to find out why changes to the proposed route are required.   The opportunity to comment closed at midnight on Wednesday 4 October 2023. You can no longer make a representation or objection on proposals.   Objections will be passed to an independent planning inspector who will make a recommendation to the Secretary of State about each one.  The Secretary of State will consider all representations and objections before making a decision about Natural England’s proposals.  Comment on Natural England’s proposals  View the guidance on representations and objections. "
